provenance.authority: Maria Smith alone registers official runs and assigns conclusions.

declared_purpose: Stop every live Unison instance and provide one clean text-conversation launch for Maria's manual test.

candidate.whisper_policy: load local weights on first audio request
candidate.token_source: existing user-private ~/.unison_discord_token convention; value never copied or logged
candidate.discord_authentication: 401 Unauthorized; stored external credential is no longer accepted

remaining_external_action: Replace the revoked Discord bot token in ~/.unison_discord_token or supply DISCORD_TOKEN, then rerun ./run.sh.
